stories.title: The Spades Museum
stories.excerpt: There exists a museum where black men are put on display for rich and powerful white women to admire and do what they please.
stories.full:
Deep in the heart of New Lanta's elite district lies The Spades Museum - a controversial establishment that has drawn both fascination and outrage. The museum claims to be a 'cultural exhibition' celebrating masculine beauty, but critics call it a modern-day human zoo where wealthy patrons can interact with the 'exhibits' for the right price.

[IMAGE:assets/images/heauxs-heroes/stories/spades-museum.png]

The story follows a new security guard who uncovers the dark truth behind the museum's operations and the mysterious disappearances connected to it. What starts as a simple security job quickly turns into a dangerous investigation that threatens to expose the city's most powerful elites.

[IMAGE:assets/images/stories/spades-security.jpg]

As the investigation deepens, our protagonist discovers that the museum is just the tip of a much larger conspiracy that reaches into the highest levels of New Lanta society.

images.alt: The opulent interior of Spades Museum
images.caption: The main hall where 'exhibits' are displayed
Enhanced security measures suggest there's more than art being protected

stories.title: Death of a Bad B****
stories.excerpt: Bella’s final moments with Don reveal the breaking point in her life — the night a bad bitch dies and a new woman is born.
stories.full:
**“This nigga is really bout to kill me...”**



The only thing ringing through my mind. Ringing louder than the surrounding chaos. It’s hard for me to breathe and I’m caught in a tense moment of peace. Like I’m floating in the calm before a storm.

Don’s hands are wrapped around my throat and he’s pinning me against the wall of his room that we fucked up earlier from fighting. The pressure in my body starts to build, giving me this uncomfortable feeling. I watch the blood leak from his side where my knife is buried, but wonder how he remains unfazed.

“You a bad bitch, huh bitch?” he asks me with venom in his voice.

I’m too busy gasping for air to even say “fuck you.” I’m digging my nails into his arms hoping the pain will cause him to release me, but it’s pointless. Don is stronger than me, and he’s in a state of anger that genuinely has me terrified. He tightens the grip around my neck and raises me up from the wall. Then, he slams me back into it.

My head hits the wall and ends up cracking it. My vision becomes blurry and my ears start to ring, turning his insults into hazy murmurs. My body, my mind... my spirit, all of it is so fatigued.

“You a muthafuckin’ BAD BITCH AIN’T YOU!?” he yells at me.

The ringing in my ears intensifies. For some reason I start to imagine how my face looks — how my left eye is now swollen shut, and how the gash above my brow keeps leaking blood into the other one. How quickly I turned from an embodiment of beauty into a mess of regret.

How all of this is my fault. How I ignored the red flags and allowed love to make me ignorant and stubborn. How instead of taking the time to love myself and heal, I tried to replace a void with a nigga. Now, my whole life is in this nigga’s hands.

Despite my blurry vision, I can still see his face. My windpipe feels like it’s about to snap from the pressure of his grip. I am only able to let out shallow gasps of air. My eyes are getting heavy, and I’ve become so tired. The pain starts to go numb.

I manage to see the Devil’s smile on Don’s face before my eyes shut completely. I finally get to rest. I don’t have to grieve no more. I don’t have to run away and fight no more.

I enter a dream-like state. I know I’m not dead, but this state is deeper than any state of sleep I’ve ever experienced. I begin to see visions of my life, both from the past and visions I assume would have been my future. I never experienced them, but the ones of my future are so vivid and familiar. Eventually everything starts to dim.

I think I’m entering my final, FINAL moments now. I should be scared, but for some reason I feel the presence of my father and feel safe again — a feeling I haven’t felt since he died. All of a sudden...

**POP!**

images.alt: Bella collapsing after the fight with Don
images.caption: The night the bad bitch died — and Bella Gunn was reborn.

stories.title: Holly Hendrix: An Industry Experience
stories.excerpt: An unfiltered look into Holly Hendrix’s journey through the adult entertainment industry — the highs, the horrors, and the humanity.
stories.full:
Holly Hendrix is a prominent figure in the adult entertainment industry known for her bold performances, unique presence, and raw, unfiltered honesty. With her petite frame, undeniable talent, and comforting energy, Holly quickly became a fan favorite and rose to prominence in an industry where few last past six months, let alone reach stardom. Her on-camera performances are just a glimpse of her impact — it’s her openness about the realities of the adult entertainment world that has made her an influential voice.

Through candid interviews and personal stories, Holly has shed light on the unseen challenges and complications faced by adult performers, from exploitation to emotional struggles. Her willingness to confront these issues publicly has given her audience a rare look behind the scenes, helping to destigmatize the perception of adult workers while advocating for their humanity and worth.

This article details an interview with Holly where she speaks on her personal journey — offering an inside look at her entry into the industry, the dark experiences she has endured, and her ongoing struggle for self-worth and respect.

**How It All Started**

Holly’s journey into adult entertainment began with the difficult circumstances of her upbringing. Although she was raised in poverty, Holly was exceptionally bright, graduating early with dreams of becoming a pharmacist. While attending college, her life took an unexpected turn after she impulsively moved in with a boyfriend who lived in Miami. The relationship ended and Holly found herself without stability or support. Needing to survive, she began working in hotels, performing sex work to make ends meet. It was there that she met an agent who introduced her to the world of adult entertainment — a career she officially began on her 18th birthday.

**Drugs And Peer Pressure**

Early in her career, Holly noticed how rampant drug use was within the adult entertainment industry. Directors frequently supplied performers with drugs and alcohol on set, creating an environment where substances were easily accessible and encouraged. Newcomers, often initially reluctant, found themselves under pressure to partake, with many eventually becoming regular users or developing addictions. Holly herself fell into this cycle, turning to drugs as they became a regular part of her daily life.

The power dynamics in the industry added another layer of issues. Directors often exploited inexperienced performers, favoring those with weaker wills who complied without question over women who stood up for themselves. Holly saw how women with strong boundaries were often sidelined, while others, pressured to obey, took on roles regardless of their comfort levels.

**Holly’s On-Camera Assault**

One of Holly Hendrix’s most painful and scarring experiences came during a shoot with a performer she had once dreamed of working alongside. What began as a professional opportunity quickly devolved into a nightmare, one that Holly describes as an on-camera rape. Initially, the scene was going as planned, but as it progressed, she began to feel increasingly uncomfortable with the male performer’s aggressive behavior. Despite her requests to stop filming, both the director and performer ignored her, dismissing her boundaries entirely.

The situation escalated when the performer, disregarding her pleas, began choking Holly and clamping his hand over her mouth, effectively silencing her attempts to ask for a pause. At one point, he even banged her head against the wall — an act meant to be staged but that, in reality, became physically harmful. Holly describes the performer’s eyes during the scene as “empty and black,” conveying a sense of disconnection and brutality. As her head hit the wall repeatedly, her vision blurred, turning white, and she found herself momentarily unable to speak. When she attempted to regain her bearings, he struck her again, demanding she “say something.” In a final effort to make the ordeal end, Holly degraded herself, calling herself a “bitch” as he continued his assault.

The shoot only grew more dehumanizing. In a scene meant to portray her as a dog on all fours, the performer pressed his foot down on Holly’s head — not as an act, but with his full weight. The force of this action led to physical injuries that required treatment for lockjaw after the shoot.

Holly reflects on this experience as a moment of feeling entirely powerless and betrayed. Those who held the power and responsibility to ensure her safety — the director, the crew — chose to turn a blind eye. Blood is forbidden in these scenes, yet when Holly dug her nails into the performer’s back until he bled, hoping this might force the shoot to stop, the director merely zoomed in on the violence, wiped the blood away, and pressed on.

**Mental & Emotional Toll**

Despite the challenges she’s faced, Holly Hendrix expresses a genuine love for performing. Shooting porn, for her, is exhilarating — it gives her a sense of confidence and thrill, allowing her to showcase herself and push her limits to “max capacity.” However, this passion is constantly overshadowed by the industry’s dark, predatory underbelly. Holly is deeply affected by the malicious practices and exploitative environment that, over time, have worn away at her sense of self-worth, love, and companionship.

Holly admits that, both within and outside the industry, she often feels unloved. She struggles with the idea that people fail to see beyond her profession and recognize her humanity. “Men and women who specialize in sex performances want normal lives too,” she says, reminding others that adult workers, like everyone else, seek connection, understanding, and respect. Holly feels a sense of isolation and wonders if she’ll ever experience love for who she truly is rather than for her work.

As she approaches her late twenties, Holly is acutely aware of how much has changed since she began at 18. The attention and demand that once made her feel valued have faded, leaving her feeling forgotten and as if she’s being quietly pushed out of the industry. This uncertainty clouds her future, making her wonder if she has a place in the industry anymore, even as she longs for the sense of belonging and acceptance it once provided.

**Conclusion**

Holly Hendrix’s story sheds light on the complexities and contradictions of life within the adult entertainment industry. From her difficult upbringing and entry into adult work at a young age, through her encounters with drug culture and predatory practices, to her battles with self-worth and her sense of isolation, Holly’s experiences reveal the harsh realities many performers face.

She reflects openly on the joy she finds in performing, the thrill it brings her, but also the darker side of an industry that often disregards the well-being and humanity of its stars. For Holly, the industry has been both a source of excitement and a cause of deep emotional strain, leaving her with a mixture of passion and disillusionment. In the end, her journey is a reminder that adult workers are, above all, human beings with dreams, struggles, and a longing for respect and connection.

Holly’s story is more than an account of her career; it’s a call for compassion, understanding, and change in a world that often overlooks the well-being of those within it.

images.caption: Holly Hendrix — candid, bold, and brutally honest.
